# Udara Sandaruwan Portfolio

Udara Sandaruwan is a full-stack developer building scalable web apps, smooth
interfaces, reliable backends, and modern digital products.

Website: https://udarasadaruwan.github.io/
GitHub: https://github.com/udarasadaruwan
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/udara-sandaruwan-ug0002/

Core topics: React, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Java, Spring Boot,
Express.js, Firebase, MongoDB, MySQL, Git, GitHub, frontend development,
backend development, full-stack development, and DevOps.
